challenge.name: Innovation Challenge on Generative AI Applications for Enterprise Scenarios Using OPEA

default_submission_fields.method_name: WearEdge Pro: OPEA Manufacturing Lao-Shi-Fu Agent
default_submission_fields.method_description: WearEdge Pro is a wearable edge AI agent for Manufacturing maintenance workflows. A Vuzix M400 captures first-person evidence, a local edge gateway performs multimodal inference and industrial RAG, and an OPEA-style Manufacturing Megaservice returns auditable action cards for human-confirmed CMMS/QMS/MES/EHS workflows. The submission focuses on the lao-shi-fu predictive-maintenance loop: evidence-first diagnosis, local knowledge retrieval, deterministic threshold evaluation, guardrailed actions, and reproducible deployment.

do_not_claim_until_implemented.Vector DB: Add and document an OPEA-compatible Qdrant, Chroma, Milvus, Redis, OpenSearch, or equivalent vector-store path first.
do_not_claim_until_implemented.Intel hardware optimization: Add an Intel CPU/OpenVINO/AVX-512 or AMX benchmark path before claiming bonus points.
do_not_claim_until_implemented.GenAIEval: Add an OPEA GenAIEval-style scorecard before presenting evaluation as OPEA-native.
do_not_claim_until_implemented.self-contained source: Mirror or vendor the selected WearEdge Pro source files into this repository before treating it as the sole project_url.
